title: Art Walk
description: Join FloridaRAMA Gallery and The Factory tenants for Artwalk every Second Saturday of the month from 5-9 PM! Drinks and snacks available for sale at FloridaRAMA Gallery. Artwalks is free to attend and artwalk guests can purchase $15 admission tickets to the FloridaRAMA experience. The current free FloridaRAMA Gallery shoe, Artificial Intelligence, is robot themed.

title: Sip & Snap: Launch Event & Photography Contest
description: Calling photographers of all ages, backgrounds, and levels of experience! Signup by April 26th to enter our photography contest for a chance to win a 12 month membership and join us on April 30th for a SPMOP launch & photo contest announcement event including a cash bar!

title: Chad Mize Installation Opening
description:
Our Florida-inspired diorama room is evolving into a new immersive experience created by renowned local multimedia artist, designer and muralist Chad Mize. 

The public opening for the installation will be May 8th and coincide with the opening of a gallery exhibition curated by Chad Mize located in our free-to-visit FloridaRAMA Gallery. 

FloridaRAMA members are invited to a VIP party & preview of the new room-sized installation.

title: Chad Mize Members Only Installation Opening
description:
Our Florida-inspired diorama room is evolving into a new immersive experience created by renowned local multimedia artist, designer and muralist Chad Mize. 

FloridaRAMA members are invited to a VIP party & preview of the new room-sized installation.

title: Mother's Day
description:

Cheers Mom with a special BOGO drink special, including Momosas.

title: Strange Cat Toy Swap
description: Designer toy swap and immersive experience, a collaborative event between FloridaRAMA & Strange Cat Toys. Join us for an evening of playful fun, swap blind box toys, make new friends, and discover a world of interactive art.
